draft: 5 things I learned from posting daily for a year. Thread below.

variants.label: Punchier hook
variants.caption: Posting daily for a year almost broke me. Here are 5 things I'd do differently. ↓
variants.rationale: Stronger emotional lead; replaces a generic numeric hook with a vulnerability angle.

variants.label: Stronger CTA
variants.caption: 5 things I learned from posting daily for a year. Which surprised you? Drop a number in comments.
variants.rationale: Comment prompt with a low-friction reply mechanic.

variants.label: Shorter
variants.caption: 5 lessons from a year of posting daily. The last one cost me $9k.
variants.rationale: Tightens copy and ends on a specific dollar figure to bait swipes.

notes_md: Your hook reads as a familiar 'X things I learned' pattern — fine, but the **CTA is missing**. Captions on your account with explicit comment prompts get 1.8× more replies.
